notes: FOREIGN tx (own history has no Haedal haSUI events; vSUI loop covered by navi-01). Flash-loan-assisted Navi collateral migration vSUI -> haSUI in one PTB, exercising the Haedal staking::UserStaked decode path with REAL on-chain data: flash-borrow 7.125 haSUI + entry_deposit (lending::DepositEvent idx 11, reserve 6, paired with pool::PoolDeposit idx 9), withdraw the vSUI collateral (lending::WithdrawEvent idx 14, reserve 5, paired with pool::PoolWithdraw idx 13), swap vSUI -> SUI on Cetus (foreign protocol event, not ours to decode), Haedal-stake the SUI (staking::UserStaked idx 16: 7.677 SUI -> 7.161 haSUI = swap:trade per docs/tax-policy.md §7), flash-repay, deposit the 0.0358 haSUI remainder (lending::DepositEvent idx 23, paired with pool::PoolDeposit idx 21; the flash-repay pool::PoolDeposit idx 19 stays unconsumed). No looping_pattern: there is no SUI BorrowEvent — wind-up detection requires mint+LST-deposit+SUI-borrow. All events flagged flash_loan (flash_loan::FlashLoan idx 8 sender = PTB sender).
